title: matelea andina
intro: Matelea andina, also known as the Andean traveler's palm, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Matelea andina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
